title: pelargonium × obscurum
intro: Pelargonium × obscurum, also known as the Rose-Scented Pelargonium, is a plant species in the Geraniaceae family, a hybrid of the Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium capitatum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of colds, coughs, and sore throats, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × obscurum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
